To set up the Olark add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create an account with "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.olark.com/", "children": [{"text": "Olark"}]}, {"text": " and copy the code for your website."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the Olak add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Paste the code from Olark and click save changes."}]}]}]}]
